list.title: Key
list.description:
the possible types of a key in an object

all literals are included

because different literals will be different keys

except undefined and null which are considered errors

objects ofcourse are not included

as different objects could be the same after to string

same to functions in case they have different environments

and same to arrays in case they are nested or containing invalid values

list.title: lib.lacks
list.description: check whether an object lacks certain key or an array lacks certain index

list.title: voyage
list.description: all methods and data

list.title: voyage.components
list.description: private data of components

list.title: voyage.info
list.description: private data in creating components

list.title: voyage.lib
list.description: some pure functions

list.title: voyage.lib.check
list.description: check type or type equality

list.title: voyage.lib.count
list.description: count a key in a counter object

list.title: voyage.lib.each
list.description: generate iterator inside for of loop

list.title: voyage.lib.has
list.description: check whether an object has certain key or an array has certain index

list.title: voyage.lib.include
list.description: base of functional programming

list.title: voyage.lib.init
list.description: init an obj with certain path. very customizable.

list.title: voyage.lib.is
list.description: strict equality test

list.title: voyage.lib.isnt
list.description: strict equality test

list.title: voyage.lib.map
list.description: map array to a function

list.title: voyage.lib.match
list.description: search all appearances for an item in a list

list.title: voyage.lib.reset
list.description: reset a key to 0 in a counter object

list.title: voyage.lib.seek
list.description: get a prop of an obj by its path

list.title: voyage.lib.set
list.description: set a prop in an obj on a certain path

list.title: voyage.lib.symbol
list.description: get unique identifier for each key. same key same identifier.

list.title: voyage.lib.sync
list.description: make an object prop reactive

list.title: voyage.lib.use
list.description: get a new function with some params filled in the old one. keep the name unchanged.

list.title: voyage.memo
list.description: some calculation results of pure functions ref by memorize()

list.title: voyage.memorize
list.description: memory a pure function with certain params. functions must have different names. the params must be literals not objects, which will be object keys.

list.title: voyage.selections
list.description: private data of nodes selected and their componentids

list.title: voyage.states
list.description: private states of components
